title: Get Britain Working: Labour Market Insights
body: "This collection contains:    quarterly updates for the Universal Credit (UC) into-work rate, including a geographical breakdown   new labour market insights from DWP analysis    Quarterly data are published in October, January, April and July. The exact publication dates for the monthly and quarterly releases are listed in the statistics release calendar.  Feedback  We are seeking feedback from users on this release of labour market insights.  We welcome all feedback on the content, relevance, accessibility and timing of these statistics to help us in producing statistics that meet user needs.  For non-media enquiries on these statistics, email: labour.marketstatistics@dwp.gov.uk.  For media enquiries, contact the DWP press office.  "
